entity.label: Haradah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Fright; fear, the twenty-fifth station of the Israelites in their wanderings (Num. 33:24).

nodes.label: Haradah
nodes.description: Fright; fear, the twenty-fifth station of the Israelites in their wanderings (Num. 33:24).

verses.text: And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.
And they removed from Haradah, and pitched in Makheloth.
